<!-- 
Thank you for creating an issue! 
Please review the labels below and add the appropriate ones to your issue.

LABEL GUIDE:
- **epic**: Use this for large, overarching issues that group multiple sub-tasks or sub-issues together.
- **draft**: Use this for ideas, work-in-progress tasks, or epics that are not yet fully refined or ready to be worked on.
- **spike**: Use this for time-boxed exploratory tasks, research, or proofs-of-concept aimed at gathering knowledge or reducing risk before implementation.
- **documentation**: Use this when the issue is specifically about adding, updating, or fixing documentation.
-->

## Context / Objective
Describe the main goal of this task, epic, or research spike.

## Proposed Sub-tasks / Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Task 1
- [ ] Task 2

## Notes / Additional Information
Add any relevant links, ideas, or architectural thoughts here.
